title: KNOWN_EXTENSIONS O(n) linear scan with .contains()
description: KNOWN_EXTENSIONS is &[&str] (5 elements); compile() calls .contains() on it in a nested loop over require extension names. N is currently tiny so cost is negligible, but the pattern should be a &[&str] linear scan noted as intentional or replaced with a small static HashSet/phf_set for O(1) lookup if the list grows — expected impact: trivial at N=5, becomes meaningful if the extension list grows significantly.
